---
name: Documentation issue
about: Report missing, incorrect, or unclear documentation
title: "[Docs] "
labels: documentation
assignees: spatchava
---

## Location
Which file, page, or section is affected? (Provide a link or path.)

## Issue
What is wrong, missing, or unclear?

## Suggested change
What should it say instead? Drafts welcome.

## Audience
Who is the documentation for? (new contributors, users, integrators, etc.)

## Additional context
Screenshots, related issues, or external references.
